title: Reduce Input Immediately
description: If you can’t move much, start here.
instruction: Lower stimulation before doing anything else.
task: Put a cool washcloth over your eyes or the back of your neck.

title: Reduce Input Immediately
description: If you can’t move much, start here.
instruction: Lower stimulation before doing anything else.
task: Play brown noise, rain sounds, or a familiar comfort show you’ve already seen.

title: Reduce Input Immediately
description: If you can’t move much, start here.
instruction: Lower stimulation before doing anything else.
task: Wrap yourself in a weighted blanket and let your body feel contained.

title: Narrow the Field
description: Slight capacity but fragile.
instruction: Reduce the number of things competing for your attention.
task: Light a candle or turn on one soft lamp to soften the room.

title: Narrow the Field
description: Slight capacity but fragile.
instruction: Reduce the number of things competing for your attention.
task: Step outside for two minutes and feel actual air on your face.

title: Narrow the Field
description: Slight capacity but fragile.
instruction: Reduce the number of things competing for your attention.
task: Name five things you see, four you feel, and three you hear.

title: Create Structure
description: You have usable energy, but it's unfocused.
instruction: Externalize the noise so your brain doesn't have to hold it all.
task: Write down everything on your mind in a messy list. Do not organize it.

title: Create Structure
description: You have usable energy, but it's unfocused.
instruction: Externalize the noise so your brain doesn't have to hold it all.
task: Pick one task and set a five-minute timer. Stop when the timer ends.

title: Create Structure
description: You have usable energy, but it's unfocused.
instruction: Externalize the noise so your brain doesn't have to hold it all.
task: Clear one small surface in front of you. Only that surface.

title: Discharge Activation
description: Your system is activated and needs a release valve.
instruction: Move the excess energy through your body safely.
task: Do 20 jumping jacks or run in place for one minute.

title: Discharge Activation
description: Your system is activated and needs a release valve.
instruction: Move the excess energy through your body safely.
task: Shake out your arms and legs hard for 30 seconds.

title: Discharge Activation
description: Your system is activated and needs a release valve.
instruction: Move the excess energy through your body safely.
task: Step outside and take ten slow, forceful exhales.

title: Find Comfort
description: Your mind is racing, but your energy is low.
instruction: Choose something gentle that helps your body feel safe.
task: Take a 20 minute nap or rest with your eyes closed.

title: Find Comfort
description: Your mind is racing, but your energy is low.
instruction: Choose something gentle that helps your body feel safe.
task: Wrap yourself in a blanket like a burrito and rest quietly.

title: Find Comfort
description: Your mind is racing, but your energy is low.
instruction: Choose something gentle that helps your body feel safe.
task: Lie down in a dark, quiet room for a few minutes.

title: Anchor to Now
description: You can engage gently, but your thoughts are racing.
instruction: Bring your attention to something real and concrete.
task: Take a warm bath or shower.

title: Anchor to Now
description: You can engage gently, but your thoughts are racing.
instruction: Bring your attention to something real and concrete.
task: Listen to your favorite music.

title: Anchor to Now
description: You can engage gently, but your thoughts are racing.
instruction: Bring your attention to something real and concrete.
task: Make a cup of your favorite hot beverage and enjoy it slowly.

title: Engage a Sense
description: Your system is elevating, but still responsive.
instruction: Choose one sense and give it your full attention.
task: Create a small comfort corner with soft blankets and calming sounds.

title: Engage a Sense
description: Your system is elevating, but still responsive.
instruction: Choose one sense and give it your full attention.
task: Take a few minutes to focus on the sounds around you.

title: Engage a Sense
description: Your system is elevating, but still responsive.
instruction: Choose one sense and give it your full attention.
task: Make tea or a simple drink and notice the smell before you sip.

title: Channel the Surge
description: Your body feels charged and needs direction.
instruction: Give the energy a focused outlet.
task: Set a two-minute timer and clean one small, specific area.

title: Channel the Surge
description: Your body feels charged and needs direction.
instruction: Give the energy a focused outlet.
task: Take a brisk walk around the block.

title: Channel the Surge
description: Your body feels charged and needs direction.
instruction: Give the energy a focused outlet.
task: Step outside and take several slow breaths of fresh air.

title: Cool Down First
description: You're angry but emotionally drained.
instruction: Give your body a moment to cool off before doing anything else.
task: Drink a glass of cold water slowly.

title: Cool Down First
description: You're angry but emotionally drained.
instruction: Give your body a moment to cool off before doing anything else.
task: Sit somewhere quiet and unclench your jaw and shoulders.

title: Cool Down First
description: You're angry but emotionally drained.
instruction: Give your body a moment to cool off before doing anything else.
task: Take ten slow breaths and focus on the exhale.

title: Create Space
description: Irritation is present but manageable.
instruction: Step away from the trigger for a few minutes.
task: Step outside or move to a different room.

title: Create Space
description: Irritation is present but manageable.
instruction: Step away from the trigger for a few minutes.
task: Take a short walk around your home or workspace.

title: Create Space
description: Irritation is present but manageable.
instruction: Step away from the trigger for a few minutes.
task: Wash your hands with cool water and focus on the sensation.

title: Redirect the Energy
description: Your frustration is building.
instruction: Channel the energy into something constructive.
task: Write down what you're feeling without editing yourself.

title: Redirect the Energy
description: Your frustration is building.
instruction: Channel the energy into something constructive.
task: Clean or organize one small area nearby.

title: Redirect the Energy
description: Your frustration is building.
instruction: Channel the energy into something constructive.
task: Stretch your arms, neck, and shoulders slowly.

title: Burn Off the Surge
description: Your system is highly activated.
instruction: Release the energy safely through movement.
task: Do push-ups, jumping jacks, or run in place for one minute.

title: Burn Off the Surge
description: Your system is highly activated.
instruction: Release the energy safely through movement.
task: Time to Dance! Put on music and move your body.

title: Burn Off the Surge
description: Your system is highly activated.
instruction: Release the energy safely through movement.
task: Shake out your arms and legs for 30 seconds.

title: Seek Soft Comfort
description: You feel heavy and don’t have much energy.
instruction: Choose something gentle that helps you feel cared for.
task: Get into bed or onto the couch and let your body fully rest.

title: Seek Soft Comfort
description: You feel heavy and don’t have much energy.
instruction: Choose something gentle that helps you feel cared for.
task: Hold a pillow or stuffed animal close for a few minutes.

title: Seek Soft Comfort
description: You feel heavy and don’t have much energy.
instruction: Choose something gentle that helps you feel cared for.
task: Put on a familiar comfort show and let it keep you company.

title: Add a Little Warmth
description: You have a little capacity, but everything feels heavy.
instruction: Do one small thing that adds comfort or warmth.
task: Make a warm drink and take a few slow sips.

title: Add a Little Warmth
description: You have a little capacity, but everything feels heavy.
instruction: Do one small thing that adds comfort or warmth.
task: Put on your softest or coziest clothes.

title: Add a Little Warmth
description: You have a little capacity, but everything feels heavy.
instruction: Do one small thing that adds comfort or warmth.
task: Step outside for two minutes and let the air hit your face.

title: Gentle Lift
description: You have enough energy for a small reset.
instruction: Choose one small action that helps your body feel less stuck.
task: Take a short shower and let the water reset you.

title: Gentle Lift
description: You have enough energy for a small reset.
instruction: Choose one small action that helps your body feel less stuck.
task: Go for a short walk, even if it’s just to the end of the driveway.

title: Gentle Lift
description: You have enough energy for a small reset.
instruction: Choose one small action that helps your body feel less stuck.
task: Tidy one small surface so the room feels a little lighter.

title: Move the Weight
description: Your feelings are strong and need an outlet.
instruction: Give your body a safe way to move through the emotion.
task: Put on one song that matches your mood and let yourself feel it.

title: Move the Weight
description: Your feelings are strong and need an outlet.
instruction: Give your body a safe way to move through the emotion.
task: Go for a brisk walk and let your body carry some of the feeling.

title: Move the Weight
description: Your feelings are strong and need an outlet.
instruction: Give your body a safe way to move through the emotion.
task: Do a quick reset: change your sheets or make your bed.

title: Rest in the Calm
description: Your mind feels quiet and your energy is low.
instruction: Notice the calm without trying to change it.
task: Watch the movement of shadows or light in the room for a minute.

title: Rest in the Calm
description: Your mind feels quiet and your energy is low.
instruction: Notice the calm without trying to change it.
task: Listen closely to the quietest sound you can hear.

title: Rest in the Calm
description: Your mind feels quiet and your energy is low.
instruction: Notice the calm without trying to change it.
task: Place a hand on your chest and feel your breathing for a moment.

title: Notice the Moment
description: You feel calm and present.
instruction: Take a moment to appreciate the calm you're feeling.
task: Look out a window and notice three things you haven't paid attention to before.

title: Notice the Moment
description: You feel calm and present.
instruction: Take a moment to appreciate the calm you're feeling.
task: Write down one good thing that happened today.

title: Notice the Moment
description: You feel calm and present.
instruction: Take a moment to appreciate the calm you're feeling.
task: Step outside and take one deep breath of fresh air.

title: Support the Balance
description: You feel steady and capable.
instruction: Do one small thing that supports your well-being.
task: Water a plant or check on something living nearby.

title: Support the Balance
description: You feel steady and capable.
instruction: Do one small thing that supports your well-being.
task: Send a short message to someone you appreciate.

title: Support the Balance
description: You feel steady and capable.
instruction: Do one small thing that supports your well-being.
task: Prepare a simple snack and enjoy it slowly.

title: Build on the Calm
description: You feel energized and balanced.
instruction: Use your energy to do something positive for yourself.
task: Put on a favorite song and dance around for a minute.

title: Build on the Calm
description: You feel energized and balanced.
instruction: Use your energy to do something positive for yourself.
task: Open a window and let fresh air into the room.

title: Build on the Calm
description: You feel energized and balanced.
instruction: Use your energy to do something positive for yourself.
task: Start a small task you've been meaning to do.
